channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car with no TAX or MOT parked on road, 18th July
item.description:
Vehicle PX62 XCM has been parked on the road following a crash in May. It has a cover on but has not been moved and does not hold and TAX or MOT
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thornlaw Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with no MOT parked in road, 18th July
item.description:
Vehicle VOY 337L left in road with no MOT
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thornlaw Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Rubbish dumped on the street, 18th July
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on street, rats and foxes having a feast

item.title: Sofa fly tipped, 18th July
item.description:
This has been here a week now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Lane, Charlton

item.description:
Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Champion Park, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Números graffiti, 18th July
item.description:
Please remove this one in the picture + 4 other small graffiti along the wall

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balls Pond Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Household rubbish, 18th July
item.description:
Sacks of household rubbish put out on wrong day and have been attacked by crows.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bridport Place, Hackney, London

item.title: Loads of fly-tipping, 18th July

Lots of stuff has been dumped on the corner of Sportsbank and Shorndean St.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sportsbank Street, Catford South, Greater London

item.title: Overgrown/trees/bushes, 18th July
item.description:
Have to walk in cycle lane, nearly got struck by cyclist. Great Cambridge Road. Hoe Lane to crematorium.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Cambridge Road, Enfield

item.title: Deposit of wood and tree branches on a tarpaulin sheet, 18th July
item.description:
Fly tipping this was not there yesterday. Was seen today 18 July

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-11, Studland Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Parks car on drive with drop curb or driveway destoeting the grass verge, 18th July
item.description:
This property keeps parking car on drive with a drop curb or drive way destroying the grass.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on Sharsted Street, 18th July
item.description:
Mattress has been dumped on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Sharsted Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes damping near drive, 18th July
item.description:
The bikes are abstracting my drive in at work. They are just damped all along the payment. This is becoming a hazard for both traffic and pedestrians as well as disabled persons like myself. Not good should locate these bike elsewhere please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cover removed and wires hanging out, 18th July
item.description:
The cover of the electric is off and the wires are hanging out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London

item.title: Two Lime Bikes Abandoned over 3 days, 18th July
item.description:
2 Lime Bikes abandoned at junction of Worsley Bridge Road and Brackley Road for over 3 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Linthorpe Road N16 Needs cleaning properly 2, 18th July
item.description:
More cigarette butts on pavement not cleaned for months tree bases not cleaned also gutters on both sides from top to the bottom of Linthorpe Road needs cleaning properly, Hackney Council street sweepers need to do their job.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Linthorpe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Linthorpe Road N16 Needs cleaning Properly, 18th July
item.description:
Cigarette butts on pavement not cleaned for months, litter around tree braces, gutters not clean properly also for months, Hackney council road sweepers needs to do their job properly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Linthorpe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
